# ForgeSelect

> A modern, lightweight, highly customizable replacement for Select2.

ForgeSelect is a zero-runtime-dependency, framework-agnostic TypeScript select/combobox component — a modern replacement for Select2. It ships ESM/CJS/IIFE bundles with type declarations, automatic virtualization for large option lists, tags, AJAX/remote data loading, rich item templates, i18n, and a small plugin architecture.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/docs/): ForgeSelect docs home: what it is, installation, quick start, and links to every guide.
- [API Reference](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/docs/api-reference.html): Full ForgeSelect constructor, options, instance methods, and event reference.
- [Examples](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/docs/examples.html): Copy-pasteable ForgeSelect code snippets for single/multi select, tags, AJAX, templates, and more.
- [Playground](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/docs/playground.html): How to use the live ForgeSelect playground and demo to try every feature in the browser.
- [Migration from Select2](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/docs/migration-from-select2.html): Option, event, and method mapping plus a step-by-step guide for migrating from Select2 to ForgeSelect.
- [Benchmarks](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/docs/benchmarks.html): Planned performance benchmarking methodology comparing ForgeSelect to Select2.
- [Plugin Development](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/docs/plugin-development.html): How to write and register custom ForgeSelect plugins using lifecycle hooks.
- [Changelog](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/docs/changelog.html): Release history and notable changes for ForgeSelect, following Keep a Changelog and Semantic Versioning.

## Try it

- [Live demo](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/demo/): a curated showcase of every feature.
- [Playground](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/playground/): write and run ForgeSelect code live in the browser.
- [Theme Builder](https://cmm-cmm.github.io/ForgeSelect/theme-builder/): customize every CSS variable live and copy the generated theme CSS.

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/cmm-cmm/ForgeSelect)
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/forge-select)
